logos.description: Walmart brand logos and sub-brand marks

screenshot.alt: Main dashboard screenshot showing campaign analytics with charts and metrics

chart.alt: Analytics chart showing performance trends over time

pictograms-mono-small.description: Large-format mono pictograms aligned with Walmart's core brand identity. Used in cross-functional contexts where Walmart branding (not Walmart+) is primary. Style: flat, monochromatic blue tones. All files stored locally in /illustrations/mono-small/.
